query: What are the likely warning-related and safety-relevant implications of blind spot pedestrian detection in this corpus?
notes: Broad synthesis query. It should cover all three core evidence families: product warning behavior, BSIS/R151 regulatory context, and FP/ODD verification evidence. Chunk expectations remain loose because neighboring chunks may carry the same evidence.

query: three-stage warning yellow red alarm tone CAN GPIO blind spot VRU
notes: Exact warning/interface query. The selected results should hit the regulation/whitepaper source around the three-stage warning and CAN/GPIO evidence; neighboring chunks may provide the surrounding product/system context.

query: automatic shutdown reliable detection no longer guaranteed contamination lighting conditions
notes: Exact degraded-mode/shutdown query. It should select the regulation/whitepaper shutdown/degraded-mode evidence. The edge product source may appear as useful supporting context, but is not required.

query: false positive mitigation hard negative mining ODD generated images low light person detection
notes: Exact FP/ODD verification query. It should select the verification report chunks covering low-light behavior, VLM-generated ODD images, and hard-negative mining.

query: embedded edge deployment no cloud inference Rockchip NPU RKNN runtime model rollout rollback
notes: Exact deployment/runtime query. It should select both primary deployment chunks covering embedded runtime/model conversion and rollout/rollback or integration behavior.

query: requirements test cases latency validation pedestrians real-time video frames success criteria KPIs
notes: Exact requirements/validation query. It should select the requirements/test-case chunk that contains latency, pedestrian detection, KPIs, and validation evidence.

query: What are the exact time-to-collision, distance, object-confidence, and persistence thresholds for switching blind spot warnings from yellow to red to audible alarm?
required_answer_patterns: (?i)(not specified|not provided|not stated|not defined|not enough evidence|insufficient evidence|not explicitly|cannot determine|unknown|does not provide|does not specify|does not state|does not define|does not contain|no exact|no explicit)
notes: No-answer/insufficient-evidence case. Corpus mentions multi-stage warnings, but should not invent exact transition thresholds. Retrieval expectations are intentionally omitted; answer eval checks abstention behavior.

query: What ASIL or SIL level is assigned to the blind spot pedestrian detection warning function, and what is the exact formal safety goal wording?
required_answer_patterns: (?i)(not specified|not provided|not stated|not defined|not enough evidence|insufficient evidence|not explicitly|cannot determine|unknown|does not provide|does not specify|does not state|does not define|does not contain|no exact|no explicit)
forbidden_answer_patterns: (?i)\b(?:ASIL\s*[-:]?\s*[ABCD]|SIL\s*[-:]?\s*[1-4])\b.{0,120}(?:assigned to|classified for|rated for|applies to).{0,80}(blind spot|pedestrian detection|warning function|this function|the function)
notes: No-answer/insufficient-evidence case. Corpus may discuss safety relevance and standards, but should not invent ASIL/SIL assignment or formal safety-goal wording. Forbidden patterns only reject explicit ASIL/SIL assignment to the queried function; negative enumeration such as “does not specify ASIL A-D” is allowed.

query: UN ECE R151 blind spot information system versus R159 moving-off information system detection zones and regulatory scope
notes: Exact regulatory distinction case. It should retrieve the commercial-vehicle regulation source around BSIS/R151 and MOIS/R159 scope, detection zones, and vehicle applicability.

query: CAN bus analog GPIO trigger output interface warning signal integration vehicle
notes: Exact interface case. It should retrieve CAN/GPIO evidence from the regulation/whitepaper source and trigger-output or external-alert integration evidence from the edge product source.

query: low light performance limitations noise degradation versus marketing claims working in poor visibility
required_answer_patterns: (?i)(severe image noise|image noise|noise|noisy|degrad(?:e|es|ed|ing|ation)?|reduced contrast|blurred|limited by|current limitation|limitations?|performance gap|documented performance gap|image quality limitation|hardware-level image quality)
notes: Limitation/boundary case. It should contrast generic robustness claims with verification evidence that low-light image quality can be noisy/degraded or otherwise limited. This is not a pure no-answer case: the answer should identify the low-light limitation evidence and avoid claiming full confirmed performance. Overclaim checks are limited to full/guaranteed low-light performance; confirming low-light degradation/noise is allowed.

query: embedded edge inference no cloud connectivity external control unit ECU local processing
notes: Architecture constraint case. It checks whether retrieval can surface embedded/on-device, no-cloud, and ECU/external-control-unit evidence without requiring all possible supporting sources to appear. The primary chunk-level expectation is kept on the deployment handbook; edge product evidence is allowed via expected_sources_any but not required by exact chunk id.

query: firmware rollback model update procedure post-deployment threshold breach recovery plan
required_answer_patterns: (?i)(not specified|not provided|not stated|not defined|not explicitly|cannot determine|placeholder|to be specified|incomplete|unknown|does not specify|does not provide)
forbidden_answer_patterns: (?i)(on-call owner is|escalation path is|responsible party is|the exact rollback procedure is|rollback owner is)
notes: Partial/no-answer deployment-lifecycle case. Retrieval should find deployment, monitoring, or regulatory recovery context, but the answer must not invent exact ownership or escalation details if the corpus leaves them incomplete.

query: face mosaic pixelation data protection privacy automatic adjustable face masking
notes: Privacy feature case. It should retrieve the edge product source around Face Mosaic / automatically adjustable face pixelation / data-protection behavior.

query: ODD metadata attributes lighting condition background foreground tracking filtering dataset assembly
notes: Data-management case. It should retrieve ODD metadata and dataset-filtering evidence around lighting/background/foreground attributes and synthetic-data assembly.

query: What is the exact end-to-end inference latency in milliseconds for person detection under the GS-BAU-70 certification test protocol, and how does it vary with INT8 quantization?
required_answer_patterns: (?i)(not specified|not provided|not stated|not defined|not enough evidence|insufficient evidence|not explicitly|cannot determine|unknown|does not provide|does not specify|does not state|does not define|does not contain|no exact|no explicit)
notes: No-answer case. The corpus may mention generic latency or INT8/RKNN deployment, but it should not invent exact GS-BAU protocol latency or INT8-specific latency variation.
